UnwrapFinalized(address,bytes32,uint64).details: Step 3 — completed after KMS decryption proof is verified.

params.handles: Array of ciphertext handles that were decrypted                              (should be [encHandle] from UnwrapRequested).

requestUnwrap(address,address,bytes32,by.details: The actual transfer amount is capped at the caller's real balance using       FHE.min, preventing underflow attacks. The true cleartext is revealed       only during finalizeUnwrap after the KMS decryption proof is presented.

params.encAmount: Amount to unwrap, encrypted client-side via the FHEVM SDK.
params.from: Address whose balance is debited (msg.sender or approved operator).
params.to: Address that will receive the underlying ERC20.

returns.requestId: Unique id for this unwrap request (emitted in UnwrapRequested).

wrap(uint64).details: Caller must have approved this contract on the underlying ERC20 first.

InvalidKMSSignatures().notice: Returned if the returned KMS signatures are not valid.

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

PublicDecryptionVerified(bytes32[],bytes.notice: This event is emitted when public decryption has been successfully verified.

finalizeUnwrap(bytes32,bytes32[],bytes,b.notice: Complete an unwrap by presenting the KMS decryption proof.

operatorTransfer(address,address,bytes32.notice: Operator-initiated confidential transfer.         Used by ConfidentialPayroll to pay salaries.         The calling contract must have ACL permission on `amount`         (granted by the payroll contract via FHE.allow before calling this).

requestUnwrap(address,address,bytes32,by.notice: Initiate an unwrap. Burns the encrypted amount from `from`'s balance         and marks it for public KMS decryption.

wrap(uint64).notice: Deposit `amount` underlying tokens and credit your encrypted balance.

userdoc.notice: Wraps a regular ERC20 (USDC / USDT) into a fully confidential token         using Zama FHEVM. Balances are stored as FHE ciphertexts — on-chain         observers cannot see how much any address holds. Unwrap flow (two-step async, per Zama protocol):   1. requestUnwrap(from, to, encAmount, inputProof)         — Burns the encrypted amount from `from`'s balance (capped at actual           balance via FHE.min to prevent underflow exploits).         — Marks the capped amount for public KMS decryption.         — Emits UnwrapRequested(receiver, requestId, encHandle).   2. Off-chain: call instance.publicDecrypt([encHandle]) via the relayer SDK         — May need a few retries if decryption is not yet ready.   3. finalizeUnwrap(requestId, handles, abiEncodedCleartexts, decryptionProof)         — Verifies the KMS decryption proof via FHE.checkSignatures.         — Transfers the decrypted amount of underlying ERC20 to the receiver.         — Emits UnwrapFinalized(receiver, requestId, amount). Authorised operators (e.g. a ConfidentialPayroll contract) may call operatorTransfer() to move encrypted funds on behalf of the `from` address, provided they have been approved first via approveOperator().
